---
description: Run the configured pipeline workflow with Codex subagents.
name: pipe
---
<!-- Generated by @oisincoveney/pipeline. -->
<!-- @oisincoveney/pipeline:host=codex -->

Invoke this skill with `$pipe <task description>`.

Workflow: default

- research kind=agent agent=pipeline-researcher needs=none
- red kind=agent agent=pipeline-test-writer needs=research
- green kind=agent agent=pipeline-code-writer needs=red
- verify kind=agent agent=pipeline-verifier needs=green
- learn kind=agent agent=pipeline-learner needs=verify

Use separate configured agents: `dogfood-checker`, `pipeline-code-writer`, `pipeline-learner`, `pipeline-researcher`, `pipeline-test-writer`, `pipeline-verifier`.
